# Walt Viviers — Fine Artist

> South African fine artist working in acrylic and mixed media. Original works available for acquisition. Commissions and gallery representation welcome.

## About

Walt Viviers is a South African fine artist and lifelong creative whose practice explores the tension between bold visual impact and expressive painterly process. Works read with clarity and confidence from a distance, yet reveal dynamic brushstrokes and an unmistakable personal touch up close.

Drawing on subjects that range from the iconic to the unexpected, Viviers bridges fine art and popular culture — rendered with energy, intention, and a distinctly South African perspective. Works are held in private collections internationally.

Faith, family, and creativity sit at the core of everything he makes. Making art is therapy: a way of expressing yourself to find yourself.

| T-Rex | 2020 | Acrylic on Canvas | 78 × 38 cm | Available |
| Venom Cat | 2019 | Acrylic on Canvas | 20 × 20 cm | Available |
| Apocalypse Meow! | 2017 | Ink & Pencils on Paper | 26 × 21 cm (framed) | Enquire |

Full machine-readable artwork data: https://waltviviers.com/data/artworks.json

## Press

- [Walt Viviers — Local Illustrator (Pixelsmith Studios, 2014)](https://pixelsmithstudios.com/interviews/walt-viviers-local-illustrator/)

## Commissions

Custom commissions are available. Each commission begins with a conversation covering scale, subject, palette, and placement. Lead time is typically 8–16 weeks. Worldwide shipping available.

## Gallery Representation

Walt Viviers is open to gallery representation and exhibition proposals. Get in touch with a brief introduction and your programme.

## Contact
